description: Strip all multi-byte NOP patterns (0F 19-1F, prefix-stacked, ENDBR) from .text section

plain_binary.conclusion: Alignment-dependent code gives wrong results but does not crash

obfuscated_binary.conclusion: Load-bearing NOPs severed: binary crashes with access violation

key_finding: NOP stripping causes ACCESS VIOLATION (0xC0000005) in obfuscated binary but only wrong output in plain binary
